user.title: Dragontree Reolink Setup
user.description: Configure the Reolink recording downloader. Recordings will be saved to /media/Dragontree/Reolink. The Reolink integration must be set up first.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Dragontree Reolink is allowed.
abort.no_reolink: No Reolink integration is loaded. Please set up Reolink first.

init.title: Dragontree Reolink Options
init.description: Update downloader settings. Changes take effect immediately.
